The Two Adulterous Sisters

4
Literal
Traditional

Oholah means her own tent or she worships at a tent shrine, a metaphor for Samaria as an adulteress with Assyria.

Oholibah means the tent is in her or she is a tent shrine, a metaphor for Jerusalem as an adulterous wife.
